creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to gja822 from comment #7)

The FTS3_TOKEN option in sqlite3 defaults to ON since ports r414699 - so that's not a workaround anymore, but "the way things are". With that, I prefer not to patch thunderbird: we already have enough patches there, and originally thunderbird comes with a copy of sqlite 3.9.1 (which we don't use and favor our own ports' sqlite3), so patching this may be a can of worms or Pandora's box - both of which should stay closed.
